description_long: This is a single brown leather boot with a high ankle collar and a rugged, utilitarian design. The upper is constructed from worn, creased leather, showing visible scuffs and discoloration, especially around the toe and heel. The lacing system features metal eyelets and thick, round laces arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, tightly securing the boot. The sole appears flat and robust, likely made from rubber, though the tread pattern is not visible in these views. The interior is dark and padded, suggesting comfort and insulation for the wearer. Overall, the boot exhibits significant signs of use, with surface abrasions and a generally weathered appearance.
description: A single, high-ankle brown leather boot with visible wear, creased leather, and a standard criss-cross lacing system. The boot looks rugged and well-used, with scuffs and discoloration throughout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, tightly laced criss-cross laces, and creased leather on the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the high ankle collar, side stitching, and worn leather surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded collar, heel creases, and overall weathered back surface.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the lacing, stitching, and scuffed leather.
